{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322022958E92806473FDCFE3A0F2C"}"},"total":322},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7588888990537401113","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"我全程看下来，主观意见是好看的，主角并没有，乱杀无辜，全是在保护家人这件事上弄的，唯一的意见是有错字，不过也是挺好的，一本书"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1766929024,"group_id":"7586553160450182168","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"当你意识到生命是会随时死去的时，你的生命才刚刚开始。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N4n2u6NJyzD336qL37N2ipfuHPTYCw3JeT8FM4RSzUq4","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/07fbf19346964f7baf26c0353857e83d~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776709954&x-signature=o0avR0Ih8V%2B4oTq%2B82TzHpYrVhI%3D","user_id":"3215411962722680","user_name":"我才没有又哭又闹"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3215411962722680","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7586553160450182168","book_info":{"abstract":"身为少年兵的约拿不知道为什么穿越到了名侦探的世界，还机缘巧合地被妃英理收养。
原本以为自己终于要在一个和平的世界展开新的生活的约拿看着米花市的新闻陷入了沉思。
约拿觉得，无论如何，一个平均每天死3个人，隔三差五就会发生爆炸案，偶尔还会有武装直升机在上空飞过的城市，怎么也算不上安全吧。
好消息，不再是少年兵，不需要上战场了。
坏消息，这里不比战场好多少，而且自己还要遵守法律，不能用枪。
好消息，自己还是能偷偷地弄到枪。
坏消息，身边的人防备自己比防备罪犯还要严密。
毛利兰：“约拿，你今天身上应该没有带匕首吧？”
江户川柯南：“约拿，我求求你，不要在犯人都认罪了之后还打他了！”
灰原哀：“约拿，你不会真的想要把手雷当做礼物送给我吧？”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/649ba3475186173381feac9c16bd8b60","author":"一杯雨","author_id":"","book_id":"7586553160450182168","book_name":"名侦探身边的少年兵","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#484848","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"6.2万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":718,"name":"动漫衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=718&name=动漫衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":39,"name":"二次元","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=39&name=二次元&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":852,"name":"魂穿","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=852&name=魂穿&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7586553218998485528","read_count":"61646","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"602691"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.3","serial_count":"282","tags":"动漫衍生,穿越,二次元,同人,魂穿,衍生","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o098a6205e863bb3ec74dc2b08d35feb8~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779301799&x-signature=JqxaXT%2Fvg1LtA9dsXYTZP466R5M%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"248923351431760","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"23"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322022958E92806473FDCFE3A0F2C"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读37分钟后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":57,"forwarded_count"
